CustomFunction.name: FoundSetToJsonValueList
CustomFunction.Calculation: While ( [ // INIT _fieldID = If ( IsValid ( GetFieldName ( _id ) ) ; GetFieldName ( _id ) ; _id ); _fieldValue = If ( IsValid ( GetFieldName ( _value ) ) ; GetFieldName ( _value ) ; _value ); _json = "[]" ; _i = 1 ; _n = Get ( FoundCount ) ] ; // CONDITION _i ≤ _n ; [ // LOGIC _json = JSONSetElement ( _json ; [ "[" & ( _i - 1 ) & "].id" ; GetNthRecord ( GetField ( _fieldID ) ; _i ) ; JSONString ] ; [ "[" & ( _i - 1 ) & "].value" ; GetNthRecord ( GetField ( _fieldValue ) ; _i ) ; JSONString ] ) ; _i = _i + 1 ] ; // RESULT JSONFormatElements ( _json ) )
